lines.speaker: General Babacus
lines.text: Please do not disturb our deliberations.

lines.speaker: General Babacus
lines.text: Lord Shayzien wishes us to draw up contingency plans for various scenarios in the ongoing war against the lizardmen.

lines.speaker: General Babacus
lines.text: If they ever succeed in cutting us off from Lovakengj, our supply lines will be severely constrained, and I must work on alternative plans.

lines.speaker: General Babacus
lines.text: So please do not disturb us further.
